input.title: MXene-Assisted NiFe sulfides for high-performance anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis
input.abstract: Anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis is vital for future large-scale green hydrogen production, however enduring a huge challenge that lacks high-stable oxygen evolution reaction electrocatalysts. Herein, we report a robust OER electrocatalyst for AEMSE by integrating MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>) with NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>). The strong interaction between (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub> and Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> induces electron distribution to trigger lattice oxygen mechanism, improving the intrinsic activity, and particularly prohibits the dissolution of Fe species during OER process via the Ti-O-Fe bonding effectively, achieving notable stability. Furthermore, the good retention of sulfates and the abundant groups of Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> provide effective Cl<sup>-</sup> resistance. Accordingly, (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> achieves high OER activity (1.598 V@2 A cm<sup>-2</sup>) and long-term durability (1000 h) in seawater system. Furthermore, AEMSE with industrial current density (0.5 A cm<sup>-2</sup>) and durability (500 h) is achieved by (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> anode and Raney Ni cathode with electrolysis efficiency of 70% and energy consumption of 48.4 kWh kg<sup>-1</sup> H<sub>2</sub>.

id: Leaf-based energy harvesting and storage utilizing

input.title: Leaf-based energy harvesting and storage utilizing hygroscopic iron hydrogel for continuous power generation
input.abstract: Abstract In the era of big data, developing next-generation self-powered continuous energy harvesting systems is of great importance. Taking advantage of fallen leaves’ specific structural advantage gifted by nature, we propose a facile approach to convert fallen leaves into energy harvesters from ubiquitous moisture, based on surface treatments and asymmetric coating of hygroscopic iron hydrogels. Upon moisture absorption, a water gradient is established between areas with/without hydrogel coating, and maintained due to gel-like behaviors and leaf veins for water retention and diffusion restriction, thus forming electrical double layers over the leaf surface and showing capacitance-like behavior for energy charging and discharging. Besides, the specific leaf cell structures with small grooves enabled uniform carbon coatings instead of aggregations, and high electrical conductivity, resulting in 49 μA/cm 2 and 497 μW/cm 3 electrical output, achieving competitive performance with the state-of-art and potential for lower environmental impact compared to other types of energy harvesters.

terms.evidence: asymmetric coating of hygroscopic iron hydrogels
a water gradient is established between areas with/without hydrogel coating
forming electrical double layers over the leaf surface
showing capacitance-like behavior for energy charging and discharging
the specific leaf cell structures with small grooves
enabled uniform carbon coatings instead of aggregations
high electrical conductivity
resulting in 49 μA/cm 2 and 497 μW/cm 3 electrical output

L1.head: 吸湿性铁水凝胶
L1.claim: 吸湿性铁水凝胶通过不对称涂覆在叶片表面建立水梯度

L1.head: 水梯度
L1.claim: 水梯度在叶片表面形成电双层结构

L1.head: 电双层
L1.claim: 电双层结构表现出类电容行为，实现能量的充放电，需要植物学领域对叶片微观结构进行优化以提升能量转换效率

L1.head: 叶片细胞结构
L1.claim: 叶片细胞结构的特殊沟槽结构实现均匀碳涂层而非聚集

L1.head: 碳涂层
L1.claim: 均匀碳涂层导致高电导率

L1.head: 电导率
L1.claim: 高电导率产生49微安/平方厘米的电流输出，需要电化学领域对电极材料进行优化以进一步提升能量存储密度

L2.head: 叶片细胞结构
L2.claim: 叶片细胞结构的小沟槽特征能够调控碳涂层的均匀分布

L2.head: 碳涂层
L2.claim: 均匀的碳涂层可显著提升材料的电导率性能

L2.head: 电导率
L2.claim: 高电导率直接转化为49微安/平方厘米的电流输出

L2.head: 吸湿性铁水凝胶
L2.claim: 不对称涂覆的吸湿性铁水凝胶在叶片表面建立稳定水梯度

L2.head: 水梯度
L2.claim: 水梯度差异驱动电双层在叶片界面的自发形成

L2.head: 电双层
L2.claim: 电双层结构实现类电容行为的快速充放电循环

L3.head: 叶片细胞结构
L3.claim: 叶片细胞结构 调控分布 碳涂层

L3.head: 碳涂层
L3.claim: 碳涂层 协同作用 吸湿性铁水凝胶

L3.claim: 水梯度 提升 电导率

L3.head: 电导率

L2.claim: 均匀的碳涂层可显著提升材料的电导率性能

L2.head: 电导率
L2.claim: 高电导率直接转化为49微安/平方厘米的电流输出

L2.head: 吸湿性铁水凝胶
L2.claim: 不对称涂覆的吸湿性铁水凝胶在叶片表面建立稳定水梯度

L2.head: 水梯度
L2.claim: 水梯度差异驱动电双层在叶片界面的自发形成

L2.head: 电双层
L2.claim: 电双层结构实现类电容行为的快速充放电循环

L3.head: 叶片细胞结构
L3.claim: 叶片细胞结构 调控分布 碳涂层

L3.head: 碳涂层
L3.claim: 碳涂层 协同作用 吸湿性铁水凝胶

L3.head: 吸湿性铁水凝胶
L3.claim: 吸湿性铁水凝胶 形成 电双层

L3.head: 吸湿性铁水凝胶
L3.claim: 吸湿性铁水凝胶 建立 水梯度

L3.head: 水梯度
L3.claim: 水梯度 提升 电导率

L3.head: 电导率
L3.claim: 电导率 输出 497微瓦/立方厘米

input.title: Precisely designing asymmetrical selenium-based dual-atom sites for efficient oxygen reduction
input.abstract: Owing to their synergistic interactions, dual-atom catalysts (DACs) with well-defined active sites are attracting increasing attention. However, more experimental research and theoretical investigations are needed to further construct explicit dual-atom sites and understand the synergy that facilitates multistep catalytic reactions. Herein, we precisely design a series of asymmetric selenium-based dual-atom catalysts that comprise heteronuclear SeN<sub>2</sub>-MN<sub>2</sub> (M = Fe, Mn, Co, Ni, Cu, Mo, etc.) active sites for the efficient oxygen reduction reaction (ORR). Spectroscopic characterisation and theoretical calculations revealed that heteronuclear selenium atoms can efficiently polarise the charge distribution of other metal atoms through short-range regulation. In addition, compared with the Se or Fe single-atom sites, the SeFe dual-atom sites facilitate a reduction in the conversion energy barrier from *O to *OH via the coadsorption of *O intermediates. Among these designed selenium-based dual-atom catalysts, selenium-iron dual-atom catalysts achieves superior alkaline ORR performance, with a half-wave potential of 0.926 V vs. a reversible hydrogen electrode. In addition, the SeN<sub>2</sub>-FeN<sub>2</sub>-based Zn-air battery has a high specific capacity (764.8 mAh g<sup>-1</sup>) and a maximum power density (287.2 mW cm<sup>-2</sup>). This work may provide a good perspective for designing heteronuclear DACs to improve ORR efficiency.
